headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +12.8)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 108% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations lead with 111 quotes including 73 at strong intensity - people are expressing significant anger and annoyance today.
• Despite the high quote volume, frustration scores dropped from yesterday's peak and remain in the middle range historically.
• Fears turned notably more negative with a concerning drop to -33.3, while optimism rebounded from yesterday's low point.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
